blockPatterns.name: stringLiteral
blockPatterns.description: Select single or double quoted string literal content

blockPatterns.name: templateLiteral
blockPatterns.description: Select template literal content including multi-line inline templates

blockPatterns.name: decoratorArguments
blockPatterns.description: Select the argument list inside an Angular decorator

blockPatterns.name: functionParameters
blockPatterns.description: Select function or method parameter list

blockPatterns.name: classBody
blockPatterns.description: Select the entire class body content between braces

blockPatterns.name: methodBody
blockPatterns.description: Select method body content between braces

blockPatterns.name: constructorBody
blockPatterns.description: Select constructor body content between braces

blockPatterns.name: arrayLiteral
blockPatterns.description: Select array literal content between brackets

blockPatterns.name: objectLiteral
blockPatterns.description: Select object literal content between braces

blockPatterns.name: interfaceBody
blockPatterns.description: Select interface body content between braces

blockPatterns.name: importSpecifiers
blockPatterns.description: Select named import specifiers inside curly braces

blockPatterns.name: genericTypeArguments
blockPatterns.description: Select generic type arguments inside angle brackets

blockPatterns.name: templateExpression
blockPatterns.description: Select Angular template interpolation expression content

blockPatterns.name: signalCallArguments
blockPatterns.description: Select arguments inside Angular signal API and inject calls

blockPatterns.name: pipeChain
blockPatterns.description: Select individual pipe name and arguments within a pipe chain in templates
